package.name: cfpa2_collaborative_autonomy
package.description: CFPA2 frontier allocator: coordinator + per-robot tick loops for 2D dual-robot exploration with space-time A* local waypointing. Pure-C++ rclcpp/roscpp node; the algorithm body is ROS-independent (hexagonal ports-and-adapters), with ros1/ adapters selected via the CFPA2_ROS1 compile definition.
